description_long: This is a light-colored athletic sneaker with a minimalist, modern design. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh fabric, featuring a uniform knit texture throughout. The shoe has a rounded toe, standard lacing system with five eyelets per side, and a low-cut ankle collar for comfort and flexibility. The midsole and outsole are made from a single piece of molded foam, providing cushioning and a seamless look. The interior appears lightly padded, and the heel counter is subtly reinforced for support. There are no visible logos or branding elements, giving the shoe a clean, understated appearance.
description: A minimalist, light-colored athletic sneaker with a mesh upper and molded foam sole, featuring a standard lace-up design and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the mesh texture, low-cut heel, and seamless foam sole.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and breathable mesh upper.
description_view_2: Side profile displaying the full length of the shoe, mesh construction, and smooth midsole.
description_view_3: Rear angle focusing on the heel counter, ankle collar, and subtle reinforcement at the back.
